name: Spare-Parts-Guide-V1.docx
content:
How do I order spare parts for C.E. King, Kalish, TB4, or Swiftpack machines?

Spare parts for all current and many legacy C.E. King machines are available through the king.parts online store. This includes parts for King, Kalish, TB4, and Swiftpack equipment.

Details

  • Visit https://www.king.parts to browse and order spare parts online
  • Parts are organised by machine type: Tablet Counters, Fillers, Cappers, Labellers
  • TB4 parts still available despite the machine being discontinued in 2000
  • Kalish capper parts (models 5130, 5210, 637) and Kalish Fillit parts available
  • Swiftpack counter parts available
  • Common spare parts: nozzles, dispensing cones, friction discs, gaskets, O-rings, sensors, motor brushes, glass discs, foot pedals
  • If you cannot find a part on the website, email support@ceking.com with the part number, machine model, and serial number
  • For compatibility queries, provide your machine model and serial number
  • Spare parts typically ship within 3-5 business days

Link: https://www.king.parts
